document.source_title: PBKS IPL 2026 Playoffs qualification scenario: How can Punjab qualify after 5 defeats

claims.claim_text: Punjab Kings have endured a terrible patch of bad form with five successive defeats.
claims.evidence_text: PBKS’ staggering freefall has now extended to five successive defeats after a loss to Mumbai Indians in Dharamsala on Thursday night.

claims.claim_text: Punjab Kings are currently on 13 points from 12 games.
claims.evidence_text: Punjab are stranded on 13 points from 12 games.

claims.claim_text: Punjab can still qualify for the playoffs if they win their next two matches.
claims.evidence_text: If they manage to win both games, Punjab could finish at 17 points and be secured of a top-four finish.
